purpose: Durable machine-readable publication/readback registry for Polyglot YouTube videos only.
notes: Do not mix ordinary single-target video rows into this registry.
The physical channel slot calendar remains config/youtube-publish-calendar.json so ordinary and Polyglot videos cannot reserve the same channel/publishAt slot.
